sentences.arabic: تَلْعَبُ الْمَرْأَةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ دَوْرًا مُهِمًّا فِي الْحِفَاظِ عَلَى تَقَالِيدِ الطَّبْخِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska žena igra važnu ulogu u čuvanju tradicije kuhanja.
sentences.translationEn: Arab women play an important role in preserving cooking traditions.

sentences.arabic: تَتَعَلَّمُ الْوَصَفَاتُ الْقَدِيمَةُ مِنَ الأُمَّهَاتِ وَالْجَدَّاتِ.
sentences.translation: Stari recepti se uče od majki i baka.
sentences.translationEn: Old recipes are passed down from mothers and grandmothers.

sentences.arabic: كَثِيرٌ مِنَ الأَطْبَاقِ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةِ تَسْتَغْرِقُ سَاعَاتٍ طَوِيلَةً فِي التَّحْضِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Mnoga tradiconalna jela zahtijevaju satima pripreme.
sentences.translationEn: Many traditional dishes take hours to prepare.

sentences.arabic: يَجْتَمِعُ أَهْلُ الْبَيْتِ فِي الْمَطْبَخِ أَثْنَاءَ الأَعْيَادِ لِإِعْدَادِ الطَّعَامِ مَعًا.
sentences.translation: Ukućani se u praznicima okupljaju u kuhinji da zajedno pripreme hranu.
sentences.translationEn: Family members gather in the kitchen during holidays to prepare food together.

sentences.arabic: الطَّبْخُ بِهَذِهِ الطَّرِيقَةِ يُقَوِّي الرَّوَابِطَ الأُسَرِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Kuhanje na ovaj način jača porodične veze.
sentences.translationEn: Cooking this way strengthens family bonds.
